description: Tracked technical debt baseline of pre-existing production accessibility issues per Standing Verification Rigor Rule (§6.7). Tests fail only when NEW un-baselined critical/serious violations occur.

baseline.notes: Pre-existing third-party badge contrast on storefront
Promotional banner contrast ratio below WCAG AA threshold
Muted grey copyright text contrast in footer
Homepage trust/USP heading pill green text contrast below WCAG AA threshold; observed in live run on 2026-07-10
Homepage Trustpilot action text green contrast below WCAG AA threshold; observed in live run on 2026-07-10
Homepage testimonial avatar red background contrast below WCAG AA threshold; observed in live run on 2026-07-10
Homepage testimonial date muted grey contrast below WCAG AA threshold; carousel-generated selectors vary by active slide
Legacy breadcrumbs markup lacking strict ul/ol nesting
Footer navigation item element parent wrapper
Header search input visible label alignment
Cart quantity adjuster input label title attribute
Responsive specification table scrollable container tabindex
Product detail page thumbnail carousel scrollable region
